subtitle: Order is black, Chaos is white, and the Balance keeps the price
author: L.E. Modesitt, Jr.
premise: On the world of Recluce, magic is the tension of two forces: Order (black) and Chaos (white). Every working exacts an equal cost; overreach destroys the wielder. The island of Recluce keeps Order; Fairhaven wields Chaos; and the Balance holds the bill for both. The cast sorts not by hero and villain but by which force they serve — and the rare few who serve both.
note: The full saga sorted by the Order/Chaos balance, with the Balance itself set apart as the true protagonist. Lineage runs through Fairhaven Rising (2021); add newer titles as they come. Every member is an ACI: a .agent (what · why · how · where) and a generated .png essence sigil. Characters by L.E. Modesitt, Jr., inspiration only. Every ACI now carries the full DLW tag with an authored six-W .spun.

classes.label: The Balance
classes.spec: the law that keeps the price

members.name: Lerris
members.why: Exiled from Recluce for the sin of boredom; learns that order is discipline, not dogma.
members.how: The patience of grain and joinery — order woven slow into wood and self.
members.where: Recluce, then Candar — The Magic of Recluce.
members.who: A restless young woodcrafter and order-mage of Recluce, the saga's first narrator.
members.when: The settled age of black Recluce, generations after the founding — The Magic of Recluce.

members.name: Kharl
members.what: A cooper who becomes an ordermage.
members.why: Injustice drives him from barrel-staves to power he never asked for.
members.how: Self-taught order from a single found book, tested in exile.
members.where: Brysta and Austra — Wellspring of Chaos, Ordermaster.
members.who: A Brystan cooper turned self-made ordermage, an artisan who never sought power.
members.when: The later age of Recluce and Austra — Wellspring of Chaos and Ordermaster.

members.name: Rahl
members.what: A natural ordermage, raw and undisciplined.
members.why: His untrained talent forces his exile — and his growth.
members.how: Order learned the hard way, in the service of Hamor.
members.where: Recluce to Hamor — Natural Ordermage, Mage-Guard of Hamor.
members.who: A natural ordermage of Recluce, raw and exiled, who finds discipline in Hamor's service.
members.when: The age of imperial Hamor's ascendancy — Natural Ordermage and Mage-Guard of Hamor.

members.name: Cerryl
members.what: An orphan who rises to White mage of Fairhaven.
members.why: Survival first, then mastery, in a guild that kills the untalented.
members.how: Chaos-fire bound by hidden order and ruthless patience.
members.where: Fairhaven — The White Order, Colors of Chaos.
members.who: An orphan risen to White mage of the Guild, a chaos-mage forged by Fairhaven's cruelty.
members.when: The rising age of the white empire of Fairhaven — The White Order and Colors of Chaos.

members.name: Lorn
members.why: Duty to a doomed and beautiful empire.
members.how: Chaos disciplined by the iron law of Cyador.
members.where: Cyador — Magi'i of Cyador, Scion of Cyador.
members.who: A magus and mage-officer of Cyad, servant of the doomed white empire of Cyador.
members.when: Cyador's long last days, before its fall — Magi'i of Cyador and Scion of Cyador.

members.name: Beltur
members.what: The mongrel mage — wields BOTH order and chaos.
members.why: Refuses to be only one thing, and is hunted for it.
members.how: Holds the two forces in tension where others can hold but one.
members.where: Gallos to Elparta — The Mongrel Mage, Outcasts of Order, The Mage-Fire War.
members.who: The mongrel mage, a hunted gray who wields both order and chaos at once.
members.when: The early age of Candar's warring city-states — The Mongrel Mage through The Mage-Fire War.

members.name: Creslin
members.what: Weather-mage and reluctant founder of Recluce.
members.why: Flees an arranged life and builds a refuge instead.
members.how: Bends wind and storm — order and chaos both, at terrible cost.
members.where: Westwind to the Roof of the World to Recluce — The Towers of the Sunset.
members.who: A Westwind weather-mage and gray-wielder, the reluctant founder of Recluce.
members.when: The founding of Recluce itself — The Towers of the Sunset.

members.name: Megaera
members.what: Healer, and Creslin's bonded other half.
members.why: Chained to him by magic; freed, at last, by her own choice.
members.how: Chaos and healing held in balance against his order.
members.where: Recluce — The Towers of the Sunset.
members.who: A healer and chaos-touched gray, Creslin's magically bonded other half and co-founder.
members.when: The founding of Recluce — The Towers of the Sunset.

members.name: Dorrin
members.why: Cast out for tinkering; proves order can be machined.
members.how: Builds black ships and engines no chaos-fire can burn.
members.where: Recluce and Diev — The Magic Engineer.
members.who: An order-smith and engineer of Recluce, father of its black-iron shipcraft.
members.when: The age of the great Order-Chaos war against Fairhaven — The Magic Engineer.

members.name: Nylan
members.why: Stranded from the sky, he must build to keep his people alive.
members.how: Smithcraft and order salvaged from a wrecked starship.
members.where: The Roof of the World, Westwind — Fall of Angels.
members.who: The angels' smith and engineer, an exile from the sky building order from a wreck.
members.when: The fall of the angels and the first days of Westwind — Fall of Angels.

members.name: Justen
members.why: War forces him to weigh order against total ruin.
members.how: Machines first — then the terrible balance-magic that ends a war.
members.where: Recluce and Candar — The Order War, The Death of Chaos.
members.who: An engineer-mage of Recluce who turns from machines to the balance-magic that ends a war.
members.when: The age of the Order War and its terrible close — The Order War and The Death of Chaos.

members.name: Saryn
members.why: Holds a women's hold against a world that wants it gone.
members.who: Arms-Commander of Westwind, an angel-descended blade holding the women's hold.
members.when: The age of Westwind's struggle to endure in Candar — Arms-Commander.

members.name: Ayrlyn
members.why: Finds her purpose in the new world after the fall.
members.how: Song, healing, and a quiet order.
members.where: Westwind — Fall of Angels, The Chaos Balance.
members.who: A Westwind singer turned healer-mage, finding quiet order in the new world.
members.when: The era after the fall of the angels — Fall of Angels into The Chaos Balance.

members.name: Ryba
members.why: Founds a hold meant to outlast prophecy itself.
members.how: Cold command and the very long view.
members.who: The Marshall of Westwind, the cold founder of a hold meant to outlast prophecy.
members.when: The fall of the angels and the founding of Westwind — Fall of Angels.

members.name: The Balance
members.what: The law that Order and Chaos must balance.
members.why: Because the world cannot hold an excess of either, and survives only at equilibrium.
members.how: Every working of power exacts an equal cost; overreach burns the wielder to ash.
members.where: Everywhere, always — the true power of Recluce, beneath every mage on this roll.
members.who: Not a person but the binding law of Order and Chaos — the true protagonist of Recluce.
members.when: Everywhere and always, across the whole long saga of Recluce.
